case_title: FAUSTINO HERNANDEZ TORRES VS. DELPHINE EARL GRAHAM

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, FAUSTINO HERNANDEZ AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, DELPHINE EARL AKA D.EARL GRAHAM AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA STONE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES, FAUSTINO HERNANDEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, DELPHINE EARL AKA D.EARL GRAHAM AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA STONE $5,231.54 PRINCIPAL, $68.27 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,479.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
